content.query:
-- 1. apply xd rules to member data

-- redact age, zip3 
delete from [appl].[closedclaims_deid_members_t];
go

insert into [appl].[closedclaims_deid_members_t]
(
    [token]
    ,[monthbegindate]
    ,[monthenddate]
    ,[coveragemonths]
    ,[continuedcoverage]
    ,[ageatendyear]
    ,[gendercode]
    ,[zip3value]
    ,[raceethnicitycode]
    ,[payertypecode]
    ,[productcode]
    ,[medicalindicator]
    ,[rxindicator]
)
select top 500000
    c.[token]
    ,c.[monthbegindate]
    ,c.[monthenddate]
    ,c.[coveragemonths]
    ,c.[continuedcoverage]
	-- redact age
    ,case when ageatendyear < 1 then 1 when ageatendyear > 85 then 85 else ageatendyear end as [ageatendyear]
    ,c.[gendercode]
	-- redact zip3
    ,case when (c.[zip3value] not like '%_%' and z2.zip3 is null) or c.[zip3value] is null or c.[zip3value] = '' then '000' 
    else coalesce(z1.zip3_to, c.[zip3value]) 
    end AS [zip3value]
    ,c.[raceethnicitycode]
    ,c.[payertypecode]
    ,c.[productcode]
    ,c.[medicalindicator]
    ,c.[rxindicator]
from 
    [customer].[stg_closedclaims_members_t] c 
    left join [dim].[zip3_pop_lt_20k_t] z1
        on c.[zip3value] = z1.zip3_from
    left join (select distinct zip3 from [dim].[census_population_by_zip3_age_gender_t]) z2
        on coalesce(z1.zip3_to, c.[zip3value]) = z2.zip3;
GO


drop TABLE [appl].[closedclaims_members_latest_zip3value_t];
CREATE TABLE [appl].[closedclaims_members_latest_zip3value_t]
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
) AS
with dat as 
(
    select 
        c.token, c.gendercode, c.raceethnicitycode, c.zip3value, max(c.ageatendyear) as max_ageatendyear
    from 
        [appl].[closedclaims_deid_members_t] c
    group by
        c.token, c.gendercode, c.raceethnicitycode, c.zip3value
)
select distinct
  a.token, a.gendercode, a.raceethnicitycode, a.latest_zip3value, a.count_zip3value
from
  (
    select
      c.token, c.gendercode, c.raceethnicitycode, 
      FIRST_VALUE(c.zip3value) OVER (PARTITION BY c.token, c.gendercode, c.raceethnicitycode ORDER BY c.max_ageatendyear desc) as latest_zip3value,
      count(c.zip3value) OVER (PARTITION BY c.token, c.gendercode, c.raceethnicitycode) as count_zip3value
    from 
      dat c
  ) a
where
  a.count_zip3value > 1
;


--update zip3
update c
set c.[zip3value] = a.latest_zip3value
from [appl].[closedclaims_deid_members_t] c
    inner join [appl].[closedclaims_members_latest_zip3value_t] a
    on c.token = a.token and c.gendercode = a.gendercode and c.raceethnicitycode = a.raceethnicitycode;
GO



-- 2. apply xd rules to claims data
delete from appl.closedclaims_deid_claims_t;
insert into appl.closedclaims_deid_claims_t
(
    [token]
    ,[claimheaderuid]

    ,[icdcmpxcode03]

    ,[icdcmpxcode17]
    ,[icdcmpxcode18]

    ,[icdcmpxcode21]
    ,[icdcmpxcode22]
    ,[icdcmpxcode23]
    ,[icdcmpxcode24]
    ,[icdcmpxcode25]
)
select
    a.[token]
    ,[claimheaderuid]
    ,[claimlinenumber]
    ,[claimstatuscode]
    ,[billingprovidernpi]
    ,[billingproviderlastname]
    ,[billingproviderfirstname]
    ,[billingprovidermiddlename]

    ,[prescribingnpi]

    ,[prescribingproviderfirstname]

    ,[prescribingprovidertaxonomycode]
    ,[prescribingtaxonomyclassification]
    ,[servicedate]

    ,[admissiondate]
    ,[dischargedate]
    ,[claimformtypecode]
    ,[tobcode]
    ,[msdrgcode]
    ,[ubpatientdischargestatuscode]
    ,[ubrevenuecode]
    ,[poscode]
    ,[hcpcscode]
    ,[hcpcsmodifiercode1]

    ,[hcpcsmodifiercode3]
    ,[hcpcsmodifiercode4]
    ,[serviceunitquantity]
    ,[loinccode]
    ,[posnegresultindicator]

    ,[supplydayscount]

    ,[icdcmpxcode22]
    ,[icdcmpxcode23]
    ,[icdcmpxcode24]
    ,[icdcmpxcode25]
from
    customer.stg_closedclaims_claims_t a
    inner join (select distinct token from [appl].[closedclaims_deid_members_t]) b
        on a.token = b.token
;

--redact hcpcs procedure codes
update c
set c.[hcpcscode] = ''
from [appl].[closedclaims_deid_claims_t] c
    inner join 
    (
        select code from [dim].[hcpcs_2024_sensitive_codes_t] 
        union 
        select code from [dim].[cpt_sensitive_codes_t]
    ) h
        on c.[hcpcscode] = h.code;
GO

--redact LOINC codes
update c
set c.[loinccode] = ''
from [appl].[closedclaims_deid_claims_t] c
    inner join [dim].[loinc_code_t] l
        on c.[loinccode] = l.code;
GO

--redact provider taxonomy
update c
set c.[billingprovidertaxonomycode] = pt.recode,
	c.billingtaxonomyclassification = pt.recode_classification
from [appl].[closedclaims_deid_claims_t] c
    inner join [dim].[provider_taxonomy_t] pt
        on c.[billingprovidertaxonomycode] = pt.code;

update c
set c.[renderingprovidertaxonomycode] = pt.recode,
	c.renderingtaxonomyclassification = pt.recode_classification
from [appl].[closedclaims_deid_claims_t] c
    inner join [dim].[provider_taxonomy_t] pt
        on c.[renderingprovidertaxonomycode] = pt.code;

update c
set c.[prescribingprovidertaxonomycode] = pt.recode,
	c.prescribingtaxonomyclassification = pt.recode_classification
from [appl].[closedclaims_deid_claims_t] c
    inner join [dim].[provider_taxonomy_t] pt
        on c.[prescribingprovidertaxonomycode] = pt.code;
GO

--redact tob
update c
set c.[tobcode] = ''
from [appl].[closedclaims_deid_claims_t] c
    inner join [dim].[type_of_bill_sensitive_codes_t] tob
        on c.tobcode = substring(tob.code, 2, 2);

--redact DRG code
update c
set c.[msdrgcode] = ''
from [appl].[closedclaims_deid_claims_t] c
    inner join [dim].[drg_sensitive_codes_t] drg
        on c.[msdrgcode] = drg.code;

--redact discharge status
update c
set c.[ubpatientdischargestatuscode] = ''
from [appl].[closedclaims_deid_claims_t] c
    inner join [dim].[discharge_status_t] d
        on c.[ubpatientdischargestatuscode] = d.code;

--redact revenue codes
update c
set c.[ubrevenuecode] = ''
from [appl].[closedclaims_deid_claims_t] c
    inner join [dim].[revenue_code_t] r
        on c.[ubrevenuecode] = r.code;

--redact place of service
update c
set c.[poscode] = p.suppression
from [appl].[closedclaims_deid_claims_t] c
    inner join [dim].[pos_sensitive_codes_t] p
        on c.[poscode] = p.code;

--redact procedure modifiers
update c
set c.[hcpcsmodifiercode1] = ''
from [appl].[closedclaims_deid_claims_t] c
    inner join [dim].[procedure_modifiers_sensitive_codes_t] pm
        on c.[hcpcsmodifiercode1] = pm.code;
GO

update c
set c.[hcpcsmodifiercode2] = ''
from [appl].[closedclaims_deid_claims_t] c
    inner join [dim].[procedure_modifiers_sensitive_codes_t] pm
        on c.[hcpcsmodifiercode2] = pm.code;
GO

update c
set c.[hcpcsmodifiercode3] = ''
from [appl].[closedclaims_deid_claims_t] c
    inner join [dim].[procedure_modifiers_sensitive_codes_t] pm
        on c.[hcpcsmodifiercode3] = pm.code;
GO

update c
set c.[hcpcsmodifiercode4] = ''
from [appl].[closedclaims_deid_claims_t] c
    inner join [dim].[procedure_modifiers_sensitive_codes_t] pm
        on c.[hcpcsmodifiercode4] = pm.code;
GO


--redact ICD diagnosis code
update [appl].[closedclaims_deid_claims_t] 
set [icdcmdxcode01]= ''
where [icdcmdxcode01] <> ''
    and ([icdcmdxcode01] like 'P%' or [icdcmdxcode01] like 'V%' or [icdcmdxcode01] like 'S06%7A' or [icdcmdxcode01] like 'S06%8A'  or [icdcmdxcode01] in ('R99', 'Z651', 'E6601') 
    or substring([icdcmdxcode01], 1, 3) in ('X52', 'Y35', 'Y36', 'Y37', 'Y38', 'Z37', 'Z38', 'X92', 'X93', 'X94', 'X95', 'X96', 'X97', 'X98', 'X99', 'Y00', 'Y01', 'Y02', 'Y03', 'Y04', 'Y05', 'Y06', 'Y07', 'Y08', 'Y09', 'W65', 'W66', 'W67', 'W68', 'W69', 'W70', 'W71', 'W72', 'W73', 'W74'))
;
GO

update [appl].[closedclaims_deid_claims_t] 
set [icdcmdxcode01] = 'Z6841'
where [icdcmdxcode01] <> ''
    and [icdcmdxcode01] in ('Z684', 'Z6842', 'Z6843', 'Z6844', 'Z6845', 'Z685', 'Z6851', 'Z6852', 'Z6853', 'Z6854')
;
GO

    inner join [dim].[icd_sensitive_codes_t] icdp
